home.title: Spaxio Assistant
home.tagline: AI infrastructure, AI widget & AI tools for modern businesses
home.description: Deploy an AI widget and AI tools on one platform: custom AI chatbot, AI CRM-style lead capture, and automation. Learn from your content and turn visitors into qualified leads.
home.browseNoAccount: No account needed to browse. Sign up when you're ready to build your AI infrastructure.
home.contactTitle: Want to talk to a human?
home.contactDescription: Have questions about Spaxio Assistant, billing, or whether it's a good fit for your business? Send us an email and we'll get back to you shortly.
home.contactFormSuccess: Thanks! Your message was sent. We'll get back to you soon.
home.contactFormError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
home.seoSectionTitle: AI infrastructure, AI widget, AI tools, AI CRM — one platform
home.seoSectionBody: Spaxio Assistant gives you a website AI widget, AI tools for lead capture and support, and AI CRM–style pipelines. Add one script to your site and get a custom AI chatbot, quote requests, and automation without coding.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Enter your details to get started with Spaxio Assistant.
signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then you can sign in.

dashboard.overviewDescription: Your AI infrastructure at a glance. Agents, automations, CRM, and knowledge in one place.
dashboard.trialEnds: Your free trial ends on {date}. Subscribe to keep your widget live.
dashboard.quickStartDescription: Add the chat widget to your website to start capturing leads.
dashboard.installPromptInSettings: Add this chatbot to your website. Copy the install code and paste it into your site's HTML.
dashboard.agentsDescription: Build AI agents that work for your business. Chat, support, qualification, and more.
dashboard.createAgentDescription: Add a new AI agent for your workspace.
dashboard.deleteAgentConfirm: Permanently delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteAgentError: Failed to delete agent. Please try again.
dashboard.knowledgeDescription: Train your AI on your business knowledge. Sources, chunks, and retrieval.
dashboard.automationsDescription: Automate operations with AI-native workflows. Triggers, logic, and actions.
dashboard.automationsHero: Your business AI operating system. Build workflows triggered by chat, forms, webhooks, or schedules—then connect agents, knowledge, and actions.
dashboard.noAutomations: No automations yet. Pick a template above or create from scratch.
dashboard.recentRunsDescription: Click a run to see input, output, and trace.
dashboard.noRuns: No runs yet. Use Test run on an automation to execute it manually.
dashboard.deleteAutomationDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its run history. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteConversationDescription: This conversation and all its messages will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteLeadDescription: This lead will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteQuoteRequestDescription: This quote request will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.analyticsDescription: Usage and performance across agents, automations, and CRM.
dashboard.aiActionsDescription: Actions your agents can perform: create leads, book appointments, send emails, and more.
dashboard.actionLogsDescription: Recent AI action runs. Filter by action, agent, or status.
dashboard.bookingsDescription: Appointments and availability. Manage scheduling from the dashboard.
dashboard.availabilityDescription: Set when your business can accept appointments.
dashboard.inboxDescription: Human + AI conversations. Assign, add notes, escalate, and reply.
dashboard.voiceDescription: Voice session history and browser-based voice agent.
dashboard.voiceNotEnabled: Voice is not enabled for your plan.
dashboard.voiceSettingsDescription: Enable voice per agent and set a greeting for browser voice sessions.
dashboard.documentsDescription: Templates and generated documents. Quotes, proposals, and reports.
dashboard.deploymentsDescription: Deploy intelligent agents anywhere. Widget, embed, or API.
dashboard.deploymentsNoConfigsWithAgents: No deployments yet. You have agents—add a deployment from each agent's Deployment tab.
dashboard.deploymentsAddFromAgentTab: Open an agent below and use the Deployment tab to add a website widget, embed, or API deployment.
dashboard.deploymentsCreateAgentFirst: Create an agent first, then add a deployment from the agent's Deployment tab.
dashboard.deploymentsOpenAgentDeploymentTab: — open Deployment tab to add a deployment
dashboard.webhooksDescription: Receive data from external systems. Create endpoints and map fields for automations.
dashboard.integrationsDescription: Connect APIs and external tools to your workflows.
dashboard.behaviorDescription: Your agents use company info, services, FAQ, and tone from Settings.
dashboard.installDescription: Add the chat widget to your website.
dashboard.installTrialNote: Your widget is active during the free trial. After {date}, subscribe in Billing to keep it live.
dashboard.installCodeDescription: Paste this snippet once, just before the closing {bodyTag} tag. The widget loads reliably, stays isolated from your site's CSS, and works on mobile.
dashboard.installNoAgentLinked: No agent linked to this widget. The chat will use default behavior until you link one.
dashboard.installLinkAgentInAgents: Open Agents to link an agent to this widget
dashboard.optionalCustomUrl: Optional: add data-base-url="https://your-backend.com" to the script tag to use a custom backend URL.
dashboard.previewDescription: See how your widget looks on desktop and mobile. Switch views with the buttons below the position dropdown.
dashboard.recentChatsDescription: Download a chat as a file or delete it. Chats are saved when visitors close the widget.
dashboard.quoteRequestsDescription: Structured quote requests from chat. Budget and "Worth it" are based on your base prices in settings.
dashboard.quoteRequestsCardDescription: Customer budget is extracted when they mention it. Set base prices per service in Settings to mark requests below your minimum as "Not worth it".
dashboard.accountDescription: Your profile and business info. Used by the AI chatbot where relevant.
dashboard.onboardingTitle: Welcome! Tell us a bit about you
dashboard.onboardingDescription: This helps personalize your dashboard and your AI chatbot. You can change this anytime in Account or Settings.
dashboard.upgradeCtaDescription: Get the full assistant with a 1-week free trial, then $29/month.
dashboard.testCheckoutDescription: Open Stripe Checkout to test the subscription flow (1 week free, then $29/month).
dashboard.dashboardErrorDescription: An error occurred in the dashboard. You can try again or go back.

errors.errorOccurred: An error occurred. You can try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

metadata.title: AI Infrastructure, AI Widget & AI Tools for Business
metadata.description: Spaxio Assistant: AI infrastructure platform with an AI widget for your website, AI tools for lead capture and support, and AI CRM. Deploy a custom AI chatbot in one line of code.
metadata.homeDescription: Add a powerful AI chatbot to your website with one line of code. Spaxio Assistant creates intelligent AI chat widgets that answer customer questions, capture leads, and automate support.
metadata.pricingDescription: Explore pricing for Spaxio Assistant AI chatbot widgets. Deploy AI chat assistants on your website to capture leads, answer questions, and automate support.
metadata.contactDescription: Contact the Spaxio team to learn how AI chatbot widgets can automate your website support and lead generation.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale with your business. Choose the plan that fits your AI assistant needs.

legal.pageDescriptionPrivacy: Spaxio Assistant privacy policy: how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our AI chatbot widget and platform.
legal.pageDescriptionTerms: Terms and conditions for using Spaxio Assistant AI chatbot widget and platform. Use of service, accounts, billing, and acceptable use.
legal.intro: This page explains how Spaxio Assistant collects, uses, and protects your data, and under which terms you can use the service.
legal.privacyIntro: We care about your privacy and only collect the data necessary to provide and improve the service.
legal.privacyDataWeCollectBody: We may collect account information (such as your name, email address, and billing details), usage data (such as log data and interactions with the widget), and content you or your visitors provide when using the assistant.
legal.privacyHowWeUseBody: We use this data to operate and secure the service, provide support, improve our models and features, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data.
legal.privacySharingBody: We may share data with trusted subprocessors (such as hosting, analytics, and payment providers) strictly to provide the service. These providers are bound by data protection obligations.
legal.privacyRetentionBody: We keep your data only for as long as necessary to provide the service, meet legal requirements, or resolve disputes. You can request deletion of your account data, subject to legal constraints.
legal.privacyYourRightsBody: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, as well as object to or restrict certain processing. Contact us if you wish to exercise these rights.
legal.privacyContactBody: If you have any questions about this policy or how we handle data, please contact us using the contact information provided on our website.
legal.termsIntro: By using Spaxio Assistant, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
legal.termsUseOfServiceBody: You may use the service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with these terms. You are responsible for the content you and your visitors submit through the assistant and for configuring the widget in accordance with applicable laws.
legal.termsAccountsBody: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.
legal.termsSubscriptionBody: If you subscribe to a paid plan, you authorize us and our payment processor to charge the applicable fees on a recurring basis until you cancel. Fees are generally non-refundable unless required by law.
legal.termsAcceptableUseBody: You must not use the service to violate any laws, infringe intellectual property rights, or transmit harmful or abusive content. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Spaxio and its affiliates are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of or related to your use of the service.
legal.termsChangesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. When we make material changes, we will update the "Last updated" date and, where appropriate, provide additional notice. Your continued use of the service after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.modalDescription: To continue using Spaxio Assistant, you need to review and accept our terms and privacy policy.
legal.modalLinksIntro: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and agree to our
